**Instructions for GitHub Copilot**
Before making any big changes to the project, always check the architecture documentation in `architecture.md` to ensure alignment with the overall design and goals.

Add documentation comments to all functions and classes using JSDoc format. This will help maintain code readability and assist other developers in understanding the purpose and usage of each component.

When implementing new features or fixing bugs, write unit tests for the affected code. Use `Jest` for testing JavaScript code and ensure that all tests pass before merging changes.
